name: Build tech-eduagent-schemas skill (@eduagent/schemas trust-boundary parse discipline) [F-113]
description: No repo-local skill codifies @eduagent/schemas as the API contract source + the mandatory safeParse-at-trust-boundaries discipline. Reduce-and-extend vs tech/zod.
acceptanceCriteria: Create .agents/skills/tech/eduagent-schemas/SKILL.md (flattened to .claude/skills/tech-eduagent-schemas/ via pnpm sync-skills). REDUCE: cite tech/zod arch-boundary-parsing + arch-untrusted-deserialization by reference (no re-explaining Zod). EXTEND: (1) @eduagent/schemas as single source of truth ('do not redefine API-facing types locally'); (2) the mandatory trust boundaries where safeParse is required (JWT/Clerk token fields, Inngest event payloads, deep-link params, LLM envelope fields) with file examples; (3) parseEnvelope() / llmResponseEnvelopeSchema as the LLM-envelope contract; (4) the useMentorLanguageSync conversationLanguageSchema.safeParse clamp as canonical example. Trigger-only description. DoD: human review of skill content before merge (skill-building is human-led per charter; shepherd may surface via channel to relax).
bodyText:
Reduce-and-extend (vs tech/zod)
tech/zod already covers safeParse patterns + boundary-parsing mechanics — cite, don't repeat. The gap is repo-specific: @eduagent/schemas as the designated contract source, the four named trust-boundary intake sites, and the parseEnvelope() LLM contract. PRG-03 B4 gate cleared (done), so skill-building is unblocked.
Note
The build itself is skill content design — human-led per the charter. Executor authors; operator reviews before merge.
